response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++) and a notable past stint contributing C/C++ components to NI LabWindows/CVI (an IDE), but the resume shows minimal recent Java/Kotlin/Spring work and no demonstrated depth in JVM internals, Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate, or IDE language tooling. Java appears only as a listed skill with brief mentions in robotic-arm and orchestration projects nearly a decade ago, which is a poor match for a Senior IDE/JVM tooling role centered on the enterprise Java ecosystem.
strengths: Prior IDE contribution experience (NI LabWindows/CVI in C/C++)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools, workshops
Polyglot background with low-latency systems and complex codebases
concerns: No demonstrated Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or enterprise Java framework experience
Java/Kotlin appear minimal and dated; Kotlin not mentioned at all
No evidence of JVM internals or language-tooling depth required for the role

key_factors.factor: Lack of Java/Kotlin and Spring ecosystem depth
No JVM internals or language-tooling experience
